Index.subtitle: Find the right AI tutor, choose your learning goal, and book a live 1-to-1 program.
Index.feature1Desc: Direct access to elite AI mentors for personalized growth.
Index.feature2Desc: Curriculum that evolves with your progress and goals.

Tutors.title: Elite AI Mentors
Tutors.subtitle: Connect with industry-leading experts for 1-to-1 guidance.

TutorProfile.styleDesc: My approach is student-centric and data-driven. We don't just learn concepts; we build mental models. Every session includes real-time feedback and actionable takeaways.
TutorProfile.guarantee: Secure payment via Razorpay • 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed

Pricing.title: Invest in Your Future.
Pricing.subtitle: Choose a coaching program that matches your learning goals. All plans include 1-to-1 live sessions and personalized AI pathways.
Pricing.guaranteeDesc: Not satisfied with your first session? We'll refund your entire program or find you a new mentor for free.

Programs.title: Learning Programs
Programs.subtitle: Structured 1-to-1 learning paths designed to take you from beginner to industry-ready.
Programs.path1Desc: Master algorithms, model training, and Scikit-Learn from the ground up.
Programs.path2Desc: Learn to build applications with OpenAI APIs, LangChain, and RAG architectures.
Programs.path3Desc: Build robust data pipelines, manage SQL databases, and handle big data streams.
Programs.path4Desc: For founders and PMs: learn how to implement and measure AI in business applications.
